cn.description:
Why RPGEmu not others?
1.SwiftUI design, to play or not to play the RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP games is easier than ever
2.Support to add your own Windows PC MV/MZ/XP game.zip into the app, that means you could enjoy your own  MV/MZ/XP games on iOS devices
3.Virtual keyboard, sometimes it is not a plus but a must, if you want to go on playing the visual novels

Note:
The app includes 3 demo games, 1 is MV Demo, 1 is MZ Demo, 1 is XP Demo, once you installed the app, you could play MV/MZ/XP game files on your iOS devices then.
Demo games are just for demonstrating the app's function is ok which it could play MV/MZ/XP games on iOS devices, for example, press 'ESC" key, you could save the game.
You could check the tutorial page to add your own game.zip into the app if you want to enjoy your own MV/MZ/XP games on iOS.
Please do not expect for the bundled games will be wonderful, they are very basic for demonstrating the app's ability only.

Most of MV/MZ/XP games should be ok to play with this app, if it does not, let me know.
RPG maker MV/MZ/XP is game framework, so one is ok, another is ok too, as both of them are made with the same tool.
Maybe you have encountered such situation:
When you downloaded a wonderful Visual Novel game from website, you do not want to play it on your windows pc, while you want to play it on your iPhone or iPad.
If the visual novel game is made with RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP, you are good to go with this app then.
RPGEmu gives your a new chance to play those windows games which made with RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP tool on your iPhone or iPad.
Though RPGEmu itself does not supply any games, it is not very hard to get "RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP Games".

Maybe you have many those game titles on your desktop PC already, just transfer the archive file to "Files App", then you can use RPGEmu load those titles and play them on the go.

If you could play those games on your windows pc, it should be ok to play them on your iPhone or iPad.

I noted such kind of visual novel games do heavily depends on keyboard, so I made a virtual keyboard.
Notes: when you see "Press Z to start", you could press "Enter" to start also.

RPGEmu also supports RPG Maker MZ game and RPG Maker XP game, Note here RPGEmu tagged [XP Game] indeed includes RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX games, as they are all written used Ruby, we just tagged it as [XP Game].

The game was made with RPG Maker MV tool, we call it RPG Maker MV game, or [MV Game].
The game was made with RPG Maker MZ tool, we call it RPG Maker MZ game, or [MZ Game].
The game was made with RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX tool, we call it RPG Maker XP game, or [XP Game].

Once you installed RPGEmu, you have the ability to play windows [MV Game] / [MZ Game] / [XP Game] on your iPhone or iPad.

Note:
When you imported the game zip file, the transfer process may need minutes to finish, please do not leave the app RPGEmu, or else, transfer process will be terminated and app will crash.
Do not leave screen that means you should not go to Home Screen or open another APP, you must keep you are on the RPGEmu's screen.
Of course, if you have to open another app, that's ok, just open the RPGEmu again, and start to transfer the game zip file from beginning again.
This behavior is not a BUG, hope you could understand it.
After transfer process finished, you could leave RPGEmu and back to RPGEmu, only when the file is in transferring, you could not leave RPGEmu.
cn.releaseNotes:
fixes some known issues.
add keyboard input for XP games, when game require you input with system keyboard, just press "...", "Show/Hide[keyboard]" will launch keyboard or hide keyboard.
added some patches for ruby 1.8
kindly note, RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX games are all tagged as "XP Game" in RPGEmu, as they are all written used Ruby.

1.  “移动端发货”：独属于你的无缝武侠大世界，真实武林画卷
       无读条世界：告别加载画面！我们打造了一个面积达256丈的无缝大世界——中原、江南、西域、南疆……从熙熙攘攘的古城街区，到人迹罕至的雪山秘境，所有场景皆可自由探索。
       活的江湖：昼夜、真实天气、万物动态（可破坏环境、可拾取万物）。世界不仅仅是背景，更是可交互的阶段。
       无束缚体验：轻功飞跃山河，踏波而行，攀爬峭壁。你的武侠梦，不再受束缚。

（我们的核心是创造一个‘无界’的武侠世界。在这里，地图没有空气墙，探索没有读条，整个世界是连贯、可交互、充满生机的）

2.  “第一代最受欢迎的玩法”：千种武学心法，自由搭配的武侠战斗
       没有僵化的“职业”限制！我们提供了超过数百种内功、外功、轻功、技艺。你可以是刀剑双绝的豪侠，也可以是精通音律、以琴音伤人的雅士，甚至是暗器毒术无双的“邪派”高手。
       武学招式不再是一成不变的关键循环。采用我们“无规则”战斗系统，所有的招式心苦自由搭配、组合，你自己的套路。是追求一击必杀的极限爆发，还是决定组建全场连绵不绝的控制？战斗的策略与乐趣，完全交由你。

3.  “你的江湖”：高自由度的人生，你的选择就是规则
       江湖不是非黑即白。你的每一个抉择都会引发难以想象的“因果链”。救下一个路人，他可能就是你未来宗门的引荐人；偷听一桩秘密，或许会让你卷入颠覆王朝的阴谋。
       可以选择拜入名门正派的恪守门规，也可以加入诡谲魔教随心所欲，更可以做个散人，逍遥自在。甚至可以完全抛开打杀，成为一名富甲天下的商贾、巧夺天工的匠人，也可以悬壶济世的神医。这个世界，认可你的每一种活法。

4.  “多达700万字的文本内容，庞大的玩法量级”：沙盒奇遇，要素隐藏线索
       《下一站江湖Ⅱ》的世界是“活”的。NPC们有自己的生活记录和喜怒哀乐。你可能在悬崖下发现前辈遗骸，学到失传绝学；也可能一碗酒，结交到一位隐世高人。
       大量未在任务列表中标记的“奇遇”事件散落在世界各个角落。探索的回报远超你的想象，真正的宝藏，永远献给最好奇的旅人。

5.  “市井百业，多维度沉浸身份”：技艺百态，感受江湖的烟火气
       江湖不止有武功。我们深入嵌入了当今同类生活技能：采矿、采药、锻造、制琴、象棋、书法、绘画、厨艺……这些不仅仅是赚钱的手段，更是提升角色、解锁特殊剧情和关卡能力的关键。一门技艺的技能，也能让你名动江湖。

【故事背景：游戏基础框架】（持续更新）
700万文字庞大世界观：战国末期，三国、百家、江湖！

1.  角色扮演：
① 多出身多结局，每个主角都是全新体验（当前已将门之子、富家千金、寒门书生、江湖浪子、无名小卒等五大身出300多万字主线剧情接近20个结局）

2.  市井身份：
① 皈依各器皿特色的城井身份独特的对应独立剧情、规则玩法。比如刺客对应青衣楼的门玩法派、以及相关的物品万字独立剧情，突出的悬赏及刺杀玩法等

3.  江湖霸图：模拟经营、骑砍LIKE、世界建造
① 物品可加入各具特色的门派
② 每个派都有自己的独立剧情以及与其他门派的恩怨，比如狂刀门和绝剑门的火烧凌云窟大型剧情
③ 每个门派都有自己突出的突出体系，以及规则：比如少林的从扫地僧至罗汉堂首座，敲钟玩法及铜人阵
④ 每个门派都强调自己的武学、心法体系
⑤ 每个门派都可以模拟经营、占领大世界的比如矿山青楼，并开启对应的经营
⑥ 每个门派都一样骑马与砍杀一样的世界争霸

4.  自由成长：习百家武学，走你自己的江湖

fixes some known issues.

added some patches for ruby 1.8
kindly note, RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX games are all tagged as "XP Game" in RPGEmu, as they are all written used Ruby.
hk.description:
Why RPGEmu not others?
1.SwiftUI design, to play or not to play the RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP games is easier than ever
2.Support to add your own Windows PC MV/MZ/XP game.zip into the app, that means you could enjoy your own  MV/MZ/XP games on iOS devices
3.Virtual keyboard, sometimes it is not a plus but a must, if you want to go on playing the visual novels

Note:
The app includes 3 demo games, 1 is MV Demo, 1 is MZ Demo, 1 is XP Demo, once you installed the app, you could play MV/MZ/XP game files on your iOS devices then.
Demo games are just for demonstrating the app's function is ok which it could play MV/MZ/XP games on iOS devices, for example, press 'ESC" key, you could save the game.
You could check the tutorial page to add your own game.zip into the app if you want to enjoy your own MV/MZ/XP games on iOS.
Please do not expect for the bundled games will be wonderful, they are very basic for demonstrating the app's ability only.

Most of MV/MZ/XP games should be ok to play with this app, if it does not, let me know.
RPG maker MV/MZ/XP is game framework, so one is ok, another is ok too, as both of them are made with the same tool.
Maybe you have encountered such situation:
When you downloaded a wonderful Visual Novel game from website, you do not want to play it on your windows pc, while you want to play it on your iPhone or iPad.
If the visual novel game is made with RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP, you are good to go with this app then.
RPGEmu gives your a new chance to play those windows games which made with RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP tool on your iPhone or iPad.
Though RPGEmu itself does not supply any games, it is not very hard to get "RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP Games".

Maybe you have many those game titles on your desktop PC already, just transfer the archive file to "Files App", then you can use RPGEmu load those titles and play them on the go.

If you could play those games on your windows pc, it should be ok to play them on your iPhone or iPad.

I noted such kind of visual novel games do heavily depends on keyboard, so I made a virtual keyboard.
Notes: when you see "Press Z to start", you could press "Enter" to start also.

RPGEmu also supports RPG Maker MZ game and RPG Maker XP game, Note here RPGEmu tagged [XP Game] indeed includes RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX games, as they are all written used Ruby, we just tagged it as [XP Game].

The game was made with RPG Maker MV tool, we call it RPG Maker MV game, or [MV Game].
The game was made with RPG Maker MZ tool, we call it RPG Maker MZ game, or [MZ Game].
The game was made with RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX tool, we call it RPG Maker XP game, or [XP Game].

Once you installed RPGEmu, you have the ability to play windows [MV Game] / [MZ Game] / [XP Game] on your iPhone or iPad.

Note:
When you imported the game zip file, the transfer process may need minutes to finish, please do not leave the app RPGEmu, or else, transfer process will be terminated and app will crash.
Do not leave screen that means you should not go to Home Screen or open another APP, you must keep you are on the RPGEmu's screen.
Of course, if you have to open another app, that's ok, just open the RPGEmu again, and start to transfer the game zip file from beginning again.
This behavior is not a BUG, hope you could understand it.
After transfer process finished, you could leave RPGEmu and back to RPGEmu, only when the file is in transferring, you could not leave RPGEmu.

hk.releaseNotes: 快來加入偵探皮埃爾的冒險之旅吧！
hk.description:
《迷宮大偵探》改編自日本IC4Design大熱插圖繪本《迷宮大偵探皮埃爾》，由法國Darjeeling工作室研發完成，是一款老少皆宜的冒險解謎遊戲。本作採用獨特有趣的繪本畫風，帶你跟隨大偵探皮埃爾的腳步，穿梭於或熱鬧非凡、或變幻莫測的奇妙迷宮世界中，和豐富的人與物進行互動，尋找散佈在各個角落的隱藏線索，探索最終出口，直到解開所有謎題。

【劇情簡介】
著名的迷宮大偵探皮埃爾先生最近又有新案子了。收藏於歌劇市博物館的迷宮石被江洋大盜X先生偷走了！ 這東西會將整個城市變成一個巨大的迷宮，這注定會釀造一場悲劇。為了尋回丟失的迷宮石，皮埃爾已經踏上了抓捕X先生的道路。繞過層層阻礙，穿過艱難險阻，大偵探勢在必得！

【遊戲介紹】
在尋回寶石的旅途中，你將遇到許多有趣古怪的角色，穿過細節滿滿的文化博物館、南法風情的遺忘之都、浪漫的熱氣球城堡······抽絲剝繭挖掘支線故事的層層細節，瞭解整歌劇城。 或許你會問「這的確是個精美可愛的解謎遊戲，但挑戰性在哪呢？」好問題！在迷宮中，雖然只有一條正確的路可以通向出口，但卻有著數不清的路徑，部分會包含隱藏的寶藏和有趣的小遊戲。探索時請務必多多觀察，你一定會收穫意想不到的驚喜。

【遊戲特點】
- 探索巨型迷宮城
改編於IC4Design大熱兒童繪本《迷宮大偵探皮埃爾》，精緻的童趣手繪畫風帶你進入錯綜複雜、充滿細節的多彩世界
 
- 互動細節滿滿
500+個互動點，內設豐富的文化元素及遊戲梗
 
- 地圖暗藏玄機
超過100個收集物件及隱藏解謎，10張地圖風格各異
 
- 沉浸式聽覺
原創音樂，帶你夢回童趣世界
 
- 獨特故事
故事劇情撲朔迷離，體驗追蹤嫌犯找回寶石的全過程和破解趣味謎題的樂趣
 
- 多語言支持
支持簡繁中文、英語、法語、德語、日語、俄語、西班牙語、義大利語、韓語等10種語言

AUTHENTIC SOCCER EXPERIENCE

VAR TECHNOLOGY MASTERY

REALISTIC PROGRESSION SYSTEM

mo.releaseNotes:
fixes some known issues.
add keyboard input for XP games, when game require you input with system keyboard, just press "...", "Show/Hide[keyboard]" will launch keyboard or hide keyboard.
added some patches for ruby 1.8
kindly note, RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX games are all tagged as "XP Game" in RPGEmu, as they are all written used Ruby.
mo.description:
Why RPGEmu not others?
1.SwiftUI design, to play or not to play the RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP games is easier than ever
2.Support to add your own Windows PC MV/MZ/XP game.zip into the app, that means you could enjoy your own  MV/MZ/XP games on iOS devices
3.Virtual keyboard, sometimes it is not a plus but a must, if you want to go on playing the visual novels

Note:
The app includes 3 demo games, 1 is MV Demo, 1 is MZ Demo, 1 is XP Demo, once you installed the app, you could play MV/MZ/XP game files on your iOS devices then.
Demo games are just for demonstrating the app's function is ok which it could play MV/MZ/XP games on iOS devices, for example, press 'ESC" key, you could save the game.
You could check the tutorial page to add your own game.zip into the app if you want to enjoy your own MV/MZ/XP games on iOS.
Please do not expect for the bundled games will be wonderful, they are very basic for demonstrating the app's ability only.

Most of MV/MZ/XP games should be ok to play with this app, if it does not, let me know.
RPG maker MV/MZ/XP is game framework, so one is ok, another is ok too, as both of them are made with the same tool.
Maybe you have encountered such situation:
When you downloaded a wonderful Visual Novel game from website, you do not want to play it on your windows pc, while you want to play it on your iPhone or iPad.
If the visual novel game is made with RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP, you are good to go with this app then.
RPGEmu gives your a new chance to play those windows games which made with RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP tool on your iPhone or iPad.
Though RPGEmu itself does not supply any games, it is not very hard to get "RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP Games".

Maybe you have many those game titles on your desktop PC already, just transfer the archive file to "Files App", then you can use RPGEmu load those titles and play them on the go.

If you could play those games on your windows pc, it should be ok to play them on your iPhone or iPad.

I noted such kind of visual novel games do heavily depends on keyboard, so I made a virtual keyboard.
Notes: when you see "Press Z to start", you could press "Enter" to start also.

RPGEmu also supports RPG Maker MZ game and RPG Maker XP game, Note here RPGEmu tagged [XP Game] indeed includes RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX games, as they are all written used Ruby, we just tagged it as [XP Game].

The game was made with RPG Maker MV tool, we call it RPG Maker MV game, or [MV Game].
The game was made with RPG Maker MZ tool, we call it RPG Maker MZ game, or [MZ Game].
The game was made with RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX tool, we call it RPG Maker XP game, or [XP Game].

Once you installed RPGEmu, you have the ability to play windows [MV Game] / [MZ Game] / [XP Game] on your iPhone or iPad.

Note:
When you imported the game zip file, the transfer process may need minutes to finish, please do not leave the app RPGEmu, or else, transfer process will be terminated and app will crash.
Do not leave screen that means you should not go to Home Screen or open another APP, you must keep you are on the RPGEmu's screen.
Of course, if you have to open another app, that's ok, just open the RPGEmu again, and start to transfer the game zip file from beginning again.
This behavior is not a BUG, hope you could understand it.
After transfer process finished, you could leave RPGEmu and back to RPGEmu, only when the file is in transferring, you could not leave RPGEmu.

mo.description:
《迷宮大偵探》改編自日本IC4Design大熱插圖繪本《迷宮大偵探皮埃爾》，由法國Darjeeling工作室研發完成，是一款老少皆宜的冒險解謎遊戲。本作採用獨特有趣的繪本畫風，帶你跟隨大偵探皮埃爾的腳步，穿梭於或熱鬧非凡、或變幻莫測的奇妙迷宮世界中，和豐富的人與物進行互動，尋找散佈在各個角落的隱藏線索，探索最終出口，直到解開所有謎題。

【劇情簡介】
著名的迷宮大偵探皮埃爾先生最近又有新案子了。收藏於歌劇市博物館的迷宮石被江洋大盜X先生偷走了！ 這東西會將整個城市變成一個巨大的迷宮，這注定會釀造一場悲劇。為了尋回丟失的迷宮石，皮埃爾已經踏上了抓捕X先生的道路。繞過層層阻礙，穿過艱難險阻，大偵探勢在必得！

【遊戲介紹】
在尋回寶石的旅途中，你將遇到許多有趣古怪的角色，穿過細節滿滿的文化博物館、南法風情的遺忘之都、浪漫的熱氣球城堡······抽絲剝繭挖掘支線故事的層層細節，瞭解整歌劇城。 或許你會問「這的確是個精美可愛的解謎遊戲，但挑戰性在哪呢？」好問題！在迷宮中，雖然只有一條正確的路可以通向出口，但卻有著數不清的路徑，部分會包含隱藏的寶藏和有趣的小遊戲。探索時請務必多多觀察，你一定會收穫意想不到的驚喜。

【遊戲特點】
- 探索巨型迷宮城
改編於IC4Design大熱兒童繪本《迷宮大偵探皮埃爾》，精緻的童趣手繪畫風帶你進入錯綜複雜、充滿細節的多彩世界
 
- 互動細節滿滿
500+個互動點，內設豐富的文化元素及遊戲梗
 
- 地圖暗藏玄機
超過100個收集物件及隱藏解謎，10張地圖風格各異
 
- 沉浸式聽覺
原創音樂，帶你夢回童趣世界
 
- 獨特故事
故事劇情撲朔迷離，體驗追蹤嫌犯找回寶石的全過程和破解趣味謎題的樂趣
 
- 多語言支持
支持簡繁中文、英語、法語、德語、日語、俄語、西班牙語、義大利語、韓語等10種語言

tw.releaseNotes:
fixes some known issues.
add keyboard input for XP games, when game require you input with system keyboard, just press "...", "Show/Hide[keyboard]" will launch keyboard or hide keyboard.
added some patches for ruby 1.8
kindly note, RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX games are all tagged as "XP Game" in RPGEmu, as they are all written used Ruby.
tw.description:
Why RPGEmu not others?
1.SwiftUI design, to play or not to play the RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP games is easier than ever
2.Support to add your own Windows PC MV/MZ/XP game.zip into the app, that means you could enjoy your own  MV/MZ/XP games on iOS devices
3.Virtual keyboard, sometimes it is not a plus but a must, if you want to go on playing the visual novels

Note:
The app includes 3 demo games, 1 is MV Demo, 1 is MZ Demo, 1 is XP Demo, once you installed the app, you could play MV/MZ/XP game files on your iOS devices then.
Demo games are just for demonstrating the app's function is ok which it could play MV/MZ/XP games on iOS devices, for example, press 'ESC" key, you could save the game.
You could check the tutorial page to add your own game.zip into the app if you want to enjoy your own MV/MZ/XP games on iOS.
Please do not expect for the bundled games will be wonderful, they are very basic for demonstrating the app's ability only.

Most of MV/MZ/XP games should be ok to play with this app, if it does not, let me know.
RPG maker MV/MZ/XP is game framework, so one is ok, another is ok too, as both of them are made with the same tool.
Maybe you have encountered such situation:
When you downloaded a wonderful Visual Novel game from website, you do not want to play it on your windows pc, while you want to play it on your iPhone or iPad.
If the visual novel game is made with RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP, you are good to go with this app then.
RPGEmu gives your a new chance to play those windows games which made with RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP tool on your iPhone or iPad.
Though RPGEmu itself does not supply any games, it is not very hard to get "RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP Games".

Maybe you have many those game titles on your desktop PC already, just transfer the archive file to "Files App", then you can use RPGEmu load those titles and play them on the go.

If you could play those games on your windows pc, it should be ok to play them on your iPhone or iPad.

I noted such kind of visual novel games do heavily depends on keyboard, so I made a virtual keyboard.
Notes: when you see "Press Z to start", you could press "Enter" to start also.

RPGEmu also supports RPG Maker MZ game and RPG Maker XP game, Note here RPGEmu tagged [XP Game] indeed includes RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX games, as they are all written used Ruby, we just tagged it as [XP Game].

The game was made with RPG Maker MV tool, we call it RPG Maker MV game, or [MV Game].
The game was made with RPG Maker MZ tool, we call it RPG Maker MZ game, or [MZ Game].
The game was made with RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX tool, we call it RPG Maker XP game, or [XP Game].

Once you installed RPGEmu, you have the ability to play windows [MV Game] / [MZ Game] / [XP Game] on your iPhone or iPad.

Note:
When you imported the game zip file, the transfer process may need minutes to finish, please do not leave the app RPGEmu, or else, transfer process will be terminated and app will crash.
Do not leave screen that means you should not go to Home Screen or open another APP, you must keep you are on the RPGEmu's screen.
Of course, if you have to open another app, that's ok, just open the RPGEmu again, and start to transfer the game zip file from beginning again.
This behavior is not a BUG, hope you could understand it.
After transfer process finished, you could leave RPGEmu and back to RPGEmu, only when the file is in transferring, you could not leave RPGEmu.

【劇情簡介】
著名的迷宮大偵探皮埃爾先生最近又有新案子了。收藏於歌劇市博物館的迷宮石被江洋大盜X先生偷走了！ 這東西會將整個城市變成一個巨大的迷宮，這注定會釀造一場悲劇。為了尋回丟失的迷宮石，皮埃爾已經踏上了抓捕X先生的道路。繞過層層阻礙，穿過艱難險阻，大偵探勢在必得！

【遊戲介紹】
在尋回寶石的旅途中，你將遇到許多有趣古怪的角色，穿過細節滿滿的文化博物館、南法風情的遺忘之都、浪漫的熱氣球城堡······抽絲剝繭挖掘支線故事的層層細節，瞭解整歌劇城。 或許你會問「這的確是個精美可愛的解謎遊戲，但挑戰性在哪呢？」好問題！在迷宮中，雖然只有一條正確的路可以通向出口，但卻有著數不清的路徑，部分會包含隱藏的寶藏和有趣的小遊戲。探索時請務必多多觀察，你一定會收穫意想不到的驚喜。

【遊戲特點】
- 探索巨型迷宮城
改編於IC4Design大熱兒童繪本《迷宮大偵探皮埃爾》，精緻的童趣手繪畫風帶你進入錯綜複雜、充滿細節的多彩世界

500+個互動點，內設豐富的文化元素及遊戲梗

tw.description:
Otter is a simple and beautiful food diary app that helps you track what you eat every day. No calorie counting, no complicated databases – just take photos, add notes, and reflect on your eating habits.

◆ WHY OTTER?

- Clean, minimal design with an adorable otter character
- Photo-based meal tracking – snap and save
- No ads, no distractions
- iCloud sync across all your devices

◆ FEATURES

- Photo Food Journal
Capture your meals with photos. A picture is worth a thousand calories – see what you eat at a glance.

- Daily Notes
Write about your day, how you felt, or what made each meal special.

- Water Tracker
Stay hydrated! Track your daily water intake with simple tap controls.

- Weight Log
Monitor your weight trends over time with easy-to-read records.

- Timeline View
Browse your food history in a beautiful timeline. See patterns in your eating habits.

- Search & Stats
Find past meals quickly and view your eating statistics.

- iCloud Sync
Your food diary stays safe and syncs automatically across iPhone, iPad, and Mac.


◆ A MINDFUL APPROACH TO EATING

Otter doesn't judge. There's no calorie counting or strict diet plans. Just a gentle companion to help you become more aware of what you eat. 

You are what you eat – let Otter help you remember it.

Questions? Contact us at OtterDietDiary@gmail.com

tw.description:
在終極駕駛遊樂場中燃燒橡膠並撕碎金屬！

Wreckfest 充滿了升級和自定義選項。無論您是準備使用加固保險槓、防滾架、側面保護裝置等進行下一次拆遷德比，還是使用空氣濾清器、凸輪軸、燃油系統等發動機性能部件為您的汽車進行一場激烈的比賽，Wreckfest 正在成為最好的競技賽車遊戲。

• 獨特的賽車體驗 –只有通過逼真的物理模擬才能實現。見證在高速賽道上瘋狂的並駕齊驅，在充滿交叉路口和迎面而來的車輛的瘋狂賽道上面臨徹底的破壞瘋狂，或者在德比賽場上大獲全勝。

• 很棒的汽車—— 我們的汽車很舊，被撞壞了，被拼湊在一起......他們散發出風格和個性！從老美國重擊手到敏捷的歐洲人和有趣的亞洲人，你在其他遊戲中找不到這樣的東西。

• 有意義的定制 – 不僅可以改變汽車的外觀，還可以升級它們的防彈衣 – 用重鐵加固它們保護您免受損壞，但也會增加重量，這會影響汽車的操控性。修改您的汽車，以製造堅固的坦克或易碎但閃電般快速的火箭，或介於兩者之間的任何東西！

• 多人遊戲 - 在本地多人遊戲中破壞你的朋友，在追逐爆破優勢的同時將賽車推向極限！

• 挑戰模式 - 與農作物收割機、割草機、校車、三輪車等等一起玩得開心！

• 職業生涯模式 – 爭奪冠軍，賺取經驗，解鎖新的升級和車輛，並成為歷史上的 Wreckfest 冠軍！

© www.handy-games.com GmbH

tw.releaseNotes: 您，可曾幻想過真正主宰一個王朝的命運？這一次，您不再是旁觀者，而是化身主角，進入這部真人互動的宮廷生存影像作品！《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》女帝篇——全新推出！您將掙脫命運的枷鎖，一步步走上那座象徵至高無上的龍椅。該如何書寫您的盛世天下？一切，由您親手決定！
tw.description:
本作品需全程連線。媚娘篇內容共十六集，女帝篇內容共三十二集，均含免費體驗章節。

您可能從沒體驗過這樣的作品——您當主角，真人互動的宮廷冒險！
《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》女帝篇全新推出！誠摯邀請您踏上驚險刺激的東方宮廷權謀之旅。

● 承襲《媚娘篇》佳績，再續宮廷傳奇
《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》媚娘篇贏得了廣大用戶的喜愛。
新篇《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》女帝篇，邀您提前鎖定這場驚心動魄的朝堂博弈，共同期待東方女帝傳奇的登頂新巔峰！

● 4K電影級質感，重塑東方宮廷美學
全程真人演繹、實景打造，結合4K電影級光影調度，匠心重現東方宮闕的恢弘氣象。從華服錦緞、金釵搖曳的細膩質感，到震撼人心的中國風配樂，全方位呈現極致東方古典美學。由官鴻、黃羿、姚弛、林小宅等知名演員傾情演出。更真實、更驚險刺激的體驗，更宏大的場景、更細膩的人物刻畫，讓盛世不再只存在於螢幕之中，而是於眼前真實展開。您將親身沉浸於「君臨天下」的東方美學盛宴！

● 從默默無聞的少女到傳奇女帝，您的劇本您來寫！
急欲掙脫命運的束縛？在本作品中，您將體驗最驚心動魄的宮廷權謀博弈！從默默無聞的少女，在多方勢力掣肘中突破困局，最終登上權力巔峰。感受運籌帷幄、制衡朝局的帝王智慧，這條逆天改命的稱帝之路，由您親手開創！

● 約1500分鐘真人演繹內容，沉浸體驗帝王人生
匠心打造的《媚娘篇》與《女帝篇》共約1500分鐘的實拍篇章，為您鋪展出一幅波瀾壯闊的盛世畫卷。面對詭譎多變的朝堂局勢，每一次落子、每一句對話，都將引發蝴蝶效應。高張力反轉、重重懸疑……在步步驚心中執掌乾坤，親手改寫王朝命運！
為您情有獨鍾或愛恨交織的角色應援助陣，誰能問鼎全球人氣榜首，皆由您一手掌控。

● 告別旁觀，真正體驗「朕即天下」
屏棄枯燥的點擊對話，深度互動玩法全面升級！權力不再只是一句空洞的台詞，而是您指尖真實運作的朝堂制衡

批閱奏摺：指尖輕點，趣解百態民生。面對層出不窮的新奇提案與市井趣事，看你如何妙筆生花、巧思破局，以奇招惠及萬民。

頒布聖旨：御筆輕懸，執掌群臣榮辱。看你如何恩威並施、論功行賞；透過封賞、發落與追貶，盡顯女帝知人善任的御人之道。

● 您是什麼類型的帝王？專屬人格測驗報告升級
在故事的終點，您還將獲得一份升級版專屬帝王測試報告！深度解析您的權謀風格、危機決策與馭人之道。究竟您是權情兼收、八面玲瓏的「絕命鶴頂紅」，還是至情至性、赴湯蹈火的「風月曼陀羅」，又或是心狠手辣、一心登頂的「卷王見手青」？在故事的最後，看見最真實的自己，並將您的專屬女帝圖鑑分享給全世界！

關於New One Studio

我們是專注於互動敘事的獨立團隊，致力於用創新手法融合東方文化與互動體驗。2019年，是一路同行的大家陪着《隱形守護者》走過 BAFTA 的榮光，更讓我們確信：好的互動敘事，能讓故事住進人心。這幾年，我們一頭栽進了古代盛世，醞釀了一個全新的故事。《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》，不僅為大家呈現東方權謀的「致命」美學，同時帶來考驗智謀與膽識的朝堂博弈。

兩個作品，不同的故事，同一顆初心，希望全球用戶都能在遊玩中再一次感受東方傳統文化的魅力，它將成為跨越文化的橋樑，為每一位支持全動態影像作品的用戶帶來一次全新體驗。

在《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》中，你將親自體驗一代女帝的成長之路。《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》之媚娘篇聚焦於她傳奇的起點——看她如何從默默無聞的少女，在危機四伏的宮廷中步步為營，憑智慧與膽識在險象環生的權力交鋒中存活下來。

在《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》女帝篇中，你將以執棋者的姿態直面更殘酷的朝堂博弈。運籌帷幄、制衡群臣，在波譎雲詭中開創盛世，親手書寫屬於你的盛世天下！

（橙光正版授權，並感謝橙光音樂支持）

X：https://x.com/roadtoempressen
Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/roadtoempress/
Discord：https://discord.gg/roadtoempress

※本遊戲內容涉及暴力，依遊戲軟體分級管理辦法分類為輔15級，十五歲以上之人始得使用。
※本遊戲為付費遊戲，且遊戲內亦另提供購買虛擬遊戲幣、物品等付費服務，請依個人興趣及能力進行適度消費。
※請注意遊戲時間，避免沉迷，長時間進行遊戲，容易影響作息，宜適度休息及運動。

us.description:
REFEREE CAREER: SOCCER DECISION MAKER
BLOW THE WHISTLE, MAKE THE CALL
Step into the boots of a professional soccer referee in this unique career simulation game. Your decisions shape matches, championships, and your own career path. Start from the bottom of the referee ranks and work your way up to the elite professional level!

* Call fouls, award penalties, and show cards
* Manage player confrontations and maintain control
* Use VAR technology to review critical moments
* Time your calls perfectly to maintain match flow
* Experience unique match scenarios each game
COMPREHENSIVE REFEREE CAREER
Begin your journey in the lower divisions (C Class) and climb your way to the prestigious Professional Class:
* C Class: Amateur matches, perfect for learning the basics
* B Class: Semi-professional matches with growing expectations
* A Class: Professional matches with intense scrutiny
* PRO Class: Elite matches with the highest pressure and rewards
Your performance determines how quickly you advance through the ranks. Exceptional referees can fast-track their careers!
MATCH AFTERMATH & REPUTATION
Every decision you make affects your reputation in the soccer world:
* View detailed post-match performance ratings
* Read social media reactions to your most controversial calls
* See how fans, players, and coaches respond to your decisions
LEAGUE TABLE & CHAMPIONSHIP IMPACT
Your decisions don't just affect individual matches - they can change entire championships:
* Access league tables to see team standings
* Understand the stakes of each match you officiate
* Balance fairness with the intense atmosphere of crucial matches
REFEREE DEVELOPMENT & CUSTOMIZATION
Earn money from each match based on your performance and division level:
* Visit the Referee Shop to purchase new equipments
AUTHENTIC SOCCER EXPERIENCE
Immerse yourself in a realistic soccer world:
* Detailed Text-Based match simulations with dynamic player movements
* Weather conditions that affect match flow and visibility
VAR TECHNOLOGY MASTERY
Modern soccer relies on 2D video review technology - master it to excel:
* Make the final call after careful analysis
* Review incidents from multiple camera angles

us.description:
Landscape Photography Helper Pro helps photographers understand and anticipate the alignment of time, light, and celestial motion behind great landscape images.
The real challenge is rarely pressing the shutter—it’s being in the right place, at the right time, facing the right direction.

Landscape Photography Helper Pro is a powerful photography planning tool that allows you to evaluate light and celestial conditions before heading out, so every shoot begins with clarity rather than guesswork.

You can use the timeline to preview the positions of the sun, moon, and Milky Way throughout the day. The 3D compass visualizes their direction and altitude in space, making light behavior intuitive instead of abstract data.

With AR mode, you can preview the future positions of celestial objects directly in your real environment and understand how they align with terrain and surroundings. The app also displays important astronomical events such as sunrise, sunset, golden hour, blue hour, and twilight, and allows you to add key moments to your system calendar for reminders.

The app provides an unlimited timeline, allowing you to predict celestial positions at any date and time. Advanced planning tools include star trail simulation, virtual viewfinder preview, sun and moon search, mountain identification, and comet position prediction.

Comprehensive map planning tools allow you to evaluate shooting conditions at any location. You can view light pollution maps, weather forecasts, and save or reload shooting locations for future planning.

Landscape Photography Helper Pro also includes a professional-grade 3D VR terrain prediction system. Built on real elevation data and independent of on-site sensors, it provides stable and repeatable predictions anywhere.

You can simulate terrain occlusion, celestial paths, and real camera fields of view before arriving on location, helping you finalize compositions in advance.

The app also supports drone composition simulation within the same real 3D terrain environment.

You can simulate drone flight altitude and lens perspective before takeoff to verify whether an aerial composition works.

The system displays real AGL (Above Ground Level) altitude and horizontal distance to your intended composition point, helping you evaluate height constraints and flight feasibility during the planning stage. This feature assists with composition planning only and does not determine airspace legality or restricted flight zones.

An integrated drone database includes common consumer models and camera parameters, allowing simulations to more closely reflect real-world equipment performance.

The latest version also introduces building alignment planning.
Built-in architectural models can be placed anywhere on the map, scaled to real dimensions, and rotated to match their real orientation. This allows you to plan precise alignments between celestial objects and buildings directly inside VR and drone simulation scenes.

You can also import custom .obj 3D models, allowing you to add your own landmarks and use them in planning scenes alongside built-in models.

Landscape Photography Helper Pro is not just a tool for viewing information—it is a tool for making decisions.

It helps you feel confident before shooting, calm on location, and efficient in creation.

Let great photographs be the result of preparation, not chance.

tr.description:
Landscape Photography Helper Pro helps photographers understand and anticipate the alignment of time, light, and celestial motion behind great landscape images.
The real challenge is rarely pressing the shutter—it’s being in the right place, at the right time, facing the right direction.

Landscape Photography Helper Pro is a powerful photography planning tool that allows you to evaluate light and celestial conditions before heading out, so every shoot begins with clarity rather than guesswork.

You can use the timeline to preview the positions of the sun, moon, and Milky Way throughout the day. The 3D compass visualizes their direction and altitude in space, making light behavior intuitive instead of abstract data.

With AR mode, you can preview the future positions of celestial objects directly in your real environment and understand how they align with terrain and surroundings. The app also displays important astronomical events such as sunrise, sunset, golden hour, blue hour, and twilight, and allows you to add key moments to your system calendar for reminders.

The app provides an unlimited timeline, allowing you to predict celestial positions at any date and time. Advanced planning tools include star trail simulation, virtual viewfinder preview, sun and moon search, mountain identification, and comet position prediction.

Comprehensive map planning tools allow you to evaluate shooting conditions at any location. You can view light pollution maps, weather forecasts, and save or reload shooting locations for future planning.

Landscape Photography Helper Pro also includes a professional-grade 3D VR terrain prediction system. Built on real elevation data and independent of on-site sensors, it provides stable and repeatable predictions anywhere.

You can simulate terrain occlusion, celestial paths, and real camera fields of view before arriving on location, helping you finalize compositions in advance.

The app also supports drone composition simulation within the same real 3D terrain environment.

You can simulate drone flight altitude and lens perspective before takeoff to verify whether an aerial composition works.

The system displays real AGL (Above Ground Level) altitude and horizontal distance to your intended composition point, helping you evaluate height constraints and flight feasibility during the planning stage. This feature assists with composition planning only and does not determine airspace legality or restricted flight zones.

An integrated drone database includes common consumer models and camera parameters, allowing simulations to more closely reflect real-world equipment performance.

The latest version also introduces building alignment planning.
Built-in architectural models can be placed anywhere on the map, scaled to real dimensions, and rotated to match their real orientation. This allows you to plan precise alignments between celestial objects and buildings directly inside VR and drone simulation scenes.

You can also import custom .obj 3D models, allowing you to add your own landmarks and use them in planning scenes alongside built-in models.

Landscape Photography Helper Pro is not just a tool for viewing information—it is a tool for making decisions.

It helps you feel confident before shooting, calm on location, and efficient in creation.

Let great photographs be the result of preparation, not chance.

Após desbloquear essa funcionalidade, você pode enviar lacaios em expedições para descobrir novas cartas sobrenaturais com benefícios poderosos. Aprimore essas missões para obter benefícios ainda mais poderosos enquanto avança. Você pode até mesmo desbloquear missões para destruir cartas do seu baralho e garantir que cada mão esteja exatamente da forma que deseja.

ALCANCE A GRANDEZA
Faça um acordo com o curinga para recomeçar em troca de fichas de pôquer (fichas de pôquer? Mas isso sequer é pôquer...?) e utilize-as para comprar aprimoramentos ainda mais poderosos.

ESCAPE DO CASTELO DE CARTAS
O curinga prendeu você em seus domínios. Você conseguirá derrotá-lo e escapar? Ou ele vai conseguir manter você lá para sempre em um ciclo sem fim?

pt.description:
Decenders é o downhill freeriding extremo na era moderna, com mundos gerados procedimentalmente, e onde os erros têm verdadeiras consequências. Irás levar a tua equipa à glória e tornares-te no próximo Decender lendário?

• Mundos gerados procedimentalmente: Enfrenta diferentes saltos, encostas e colinas sempre que jogares.
• Controlos de estilo livre: Controla cada movimento subtil do teu ciclista, com um sistema de física elaborado para truques repletos de estilo e fluidez. 
• Risco vs Recompensa: Faz o teu ciclista alcançar grandes pontuações e combos -- mas falha muitas vezes e podes perder tudo
• Constrói a tua reputação: Um sistema de reputação online completo que te permite mostrares o que vales e ganhar novas bicicletas e equipamento
• Uma banda sonora totalmente licenciada: a nossa parceria com a Liquicity traz-vos as melhores músicas de drum & bass, perfeitas para enfrentar as montanhas.
• Torna-te o próximo Descender: Consegues sobreviver ao jogo todo de uma só vez e chegar às classificações de Decenders lendários?

Escolhe uma Equipa, Torna-te uma Lenda

Em Decenders, a tua equipa é a tua vida. Quando escolhes uma equipa -- Enemy, Arboreal ou Kinetic -- vais-te unir a outros jogadores que escolheram a mesma côr que tu.

Pega na tua bicicleta, escolhe a tua equipa e vive à altura da lenda do teu Descender. Vais juntar-te aos mestres dos truques da Team Enemy, ao estilo proficiente e fora de estrada da Team Arboreal, ou escolherás a veloz e destemida Team Kinetic?

• Veste as cores da tua equipa com orgulho e recebe equipamento exclusive
• Prémios exclusivos são entregues à equipa com a maior reputação
• Ganha acesso ao canal exclusivo da tua equipa no servidor Discord Descenders.

pt.description:
Landscape Photography Helper Pro helps photographers understand and anticipate the alignment of time, light, and celestial motion behind great landscape images.
The real challenge is rarely pressing the shutter—it’s being in the right place, at the right time, facing the right direction.

Landscape Photography Helper Pro is a powerful photography planning tool that allows you to evaluate light and celestial conditions before heading out, so every shoot begins with clarity rather than guesswork.

You can use the timeline to preview the positions of the sun, moon, and Milky Way throughout the day. The 3D compass visualizes their direction and altitude in space, making light behavior intuitive instead of abstract data.

With AR mode, you can preview the future positions of celestial objects directly in your real environment and understand how they align with terrain and surroundings. The app also displays important astronomical events such as sunrise, sunset, golden hour, blue hour, and twilight, and allows you to add key moments to your system calendar for reminders.

The app provides an unlimited timeline, allowing you to predict celestial positions at any date and time. Advanced planning tools include star trail simulation, virtual viewfinder preview, sun and moon search, mountain identification, and comet position prediction.

Comprehensive map planning tools allow you to evaluate shooting conditions at any location. You can view light pollution maps, weather forecasts, and save or reload shooting locations for future planning.

Landscape Photography Helper Pro also includes a professional-grade 3D VR terrain prediction system. Built on real elevation data and independent of on-site sensors, it provides stable and repeatable predictions anywhere.

You can simulate terrain occlusion, celestial paths, and real camera fields of view before arriving on location, helping you finalize compositions in advance.

The app also supports drone composition simulation within the same real 3D terrain environment.

You can simulate drone flight altitude and lens perspective before takeoff to verify whether an aerial composition works.

The system displays real AGL (Above Ground Level) altitude and horizontal distance to your intended composition point, helping you evaluate height constraints and flight feasibility during the planning stage. This feature assists with composition planning only and does not determine airspace legality or restricted flight zones.

An integrated drone database includes common consumer models and camera parameters, allowing simulations to more closely reflect real-world equipment performance.

The latest version also introduces building alignment planning.
Built-in architectural models can be placed anywhere on the map, scaled to real dimensions, and rotated to match their real orientation. This allows you to plan precise alignments between celestial objects and buildings directly inside VR and drone simulation scenes.

You can also import custom .obj 3D models, allowing you to add your own landmarks and use them in planning scenes alongside built-in models.

Landscape Photography Helper Pro is not just a tool for viewing information—it is a tool for making decisions.

It helps you feel confident before shooting, calm on location, and efficient in creation.

Let great photographs be the result of preparation, not chance.
